title: Component Name (componentname)
text: Component Name (componentname) DspContainer widget property that defines the name of the DSP component to embed in the DspContainer. " componentname = ComponentName " Usage Dynamic? Yes Description The DspContainer widget property componentname specifies the DSP component to instantiate. If no name is specified, the instance name specified in the field value is used as component name. Related Links DspContainer The DspContainer logical widget provides a default mapping to the dspContainer physical widget. It enables you to embed multiple dynamic server pages in a single web page.
